/CAL:POSSIBLE OR RELEASE THROUGH ELECTRONIC MONITORING/OR/X:WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:/X:DEFENDANT MUST PARICIPATE AND COMPLETE SF SHERIFF'S DEPT'S NOVA PROGRAM,STAY AT A DETOX AND,OR SOBER LIVING ENVIRONMENT, AND FOLLOW ELECTRONIC MONITORING RULES/X:COURT ORDERS A FULL ON HOME DETENTION MONITORING WITH THE INSTRUCTIONS THAT IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CONDITIONS OF RELEASE, AS STATED ABOVE, HE WILL BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY/ /X:THECOURT CONFIRMS THE PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-21-17/DOP/
